Augmented.WrongSystem: Cyberpunk 2020: Augmented Edition requires the Cyberpunk 2020 system to be active.

CYBERPUNK.SaveNotOwned: You don't own {name} — only its owner or the GM can make this save.
CYBERPUNK.StabilizeNoGM: Stabilization succeeded, but no GM is connected to record it.
CYBERPUNK.StabilizeRelayed: Stabilization recorded — the GM will confirm it.
CYBERPUNK.ParryDeclareBody: The next incoming melee attack is automatically blocked. Parry is consumed on first use. The parrying character takes −3 to all other actions this turn. (CP2020 p.102)
CYBERPUNK.ActNowBody: Use the character sheet to fire weapons or take actions.
CYBERPUNK.SuppFireNoToken: Suppressive fire: the attacker's token isn't on the active scene, so the fire zone can't be placed. Drop the attacker's token on the canvas (or target tokens manually and use the evasion prompts).
CYBERPUNK.SuppFireZoneFail: Could not place the suppressive fire zone.
CYBERPUNK.FireZoneNotFound: Fire zone not found — it may have been removed.
CYBERPUNK.NoTokensOnScene: No tokens on the current scene.
CYBERPUNK.NoTokenTargeted: No token is targeted. Right-click a token → Target (or hover + T), then click Apply Damage again.
CYBERPUNK.TakeAimTitle: Take Aim (+1 to hit per consecutive round, max +3)
CYBERPUNK.TakeAimTitleActive: Aiming ({n}/3 rounds). Click to increment. Click at 3 to reset.
CYBERPUNK.WaitActTitle: Take delayed action — announce you are acting now
CYBERPUNK.WaitForTurnBtnTitle: Wait for Turn — skip this slot and act after a chosen combatant
CYBERPUNK.DodgeTitle: Declare Dodge (−2 to attacker's melee roll, costs your action)
CYBERPUNK.DodgeTitleActive: Dodging (−2 to attacker's melee roll this round) — click to cancel
CYBERPUNK.ParryTitle: Declare Parry (block next melee attack, −3 to own other actions)
CYBERPUNK.ParryTitleActive: Parrying (next melee attack blocked) — click to cancel
CYBERPUNK.StillHeldBody: 🤜 {name} is still held by {holder}. Can only attempt Escape this turn.
CYBERPUNK.GrappledReminderBody: 🤜 {name} is grappled by {grappler}. Must escape or the grappler may Hold/Choke/Throw freely.
CYBERPUNK.ExplosionTemplateNotFound: Explosion template not found — it may have been removed.
CYBERPUNK.NoTokensInBlast: No tokens in the blast (or all behind cover).
CYBERPUNK.ScatterBody: 🎲 Scatter — {dir}{drift}. Reposition if needed, then Confirm Blast.
CYBERPUNK.SpreadFireNoToken: Spread fire: the attacker's token isn't on the active scene, so the pattern can't be placed.
CYBERPUNK.SpreadTemplateNotFound: Spread template not found — it may have been removed.
CYBERPUNK.NoTokensInSpread: No tokens in the spread pattern (or all behind cover).
CYBERPUNK.AddActionTitle: Manual Action — mark an action not tracked automatically (e.g., reload, mount/dismount)
CYBERPUNK.DamageSentWaiting: Damage sent — waiting for GM to apply.
CYBERPUNK.LimbWoundDeathSaveClause: Immediate Death Save required at Mortal 0.

Fumble.AutoWeaponOnlyJam: Automatic weapons: fumble table is ignored; only a Reliability jam check is made.
Fumble.DischargeApplied: Result: the weapon discharged (ammo is now 0).
Fumble.DischargeNotApplied: Result: lucky you, it didn’t discharge - just a misfire

AutoNotice.SettingsHint: Open Game Settings → Configure Settings → System to review combat options.

CYBERPUNK.ExplosionConfirmSummary: Blast radius {radius}m, base damage {damage}, full damage within {within}m.
CYBERPUNK.ExplosionConfirmHint: If the throw missed, click Scatter to roll where it really lands; otherwise reposition for cover and click Confirm. Damage falls off by distance.
CYBERPUNK.SpreadConfirmHint: Aim the pattern, then click Confirm. Everyone in the straight path is hit (CP2020 p.108).
CYBERPUNK.DeathSaveAutoResult: ☠ AUTOMATIC DEATH — Death Save threshold is 0 (roll ≤ 0 on 1d10 is impossible). {name} dies.
CYBERPUNK.DeathSaveResultWin: ✅ SURVIVED (rolled {result} ≤ {threshold}) — {name} clings to life. Another save required next turn.
CYBERPUNK.DeathSaveResultLose: ☠ DIED (rolled {result} > {threshold}) — {name} dies at end of this turn. Call Trauma Team.
CYBERPUNK.StabilizeHint: Stabilize: TECH + Medical + 1d10 ≥ total damage ({damage} pts)
CYBERPUNK.TargetPickPrompt: 🎯 Target a token on the canvas:
CYBERPUNK.TargetPickNoneHint: No token targeted yet. Right-click a token → Target, or hover and press T, then click Use Canvas Target.
CYBERPUNK.HeadWoundAutoDeath: ☠ AUTOMATIC DEATH — A head wound of more than 8 points kills automatically (CP2020 p.103). {name} dies. Call Trauma Team.
CYBERPUNK.DeathSaveAutoWarn: ⚠ Automatic death — threshold is 0, no roll can succeed.
CYBERPUNK.DeathSaveNeed: Must roll ≤ {threshold} on 1d10 to survive this turn
CYBERPUNK.SuppPlacementPlaced: The fire zone template has been placed on the canvas.
CYBERPUNK.SuppPlacementHint: Rotate the template to aim, then click Confirm Fire Zone to issue evasion prompts to tokens in the zone. The zone persists until the next round.
CYBERPUNK.StunSaveNeed: Must roll ≤ {threshold} on 1d10 to stay conscious
CYBERPUNK.SuppEvasionEvaded: ✅ EVADED ({total} > {dc}) — {name} clears the fire zone.
CYBERPUNK.SuppEvasionCaught: ❌ CAUGHT ({total} ≤ {dc}) — {name} takes hits! Rolling damage...
CYBERPUNK.StabilizeResultWin: ✅ STABILIZED — Roll total: {breakdown} ≥ {damage}. No further Death Saves required.
CYBERPUNK.StabilizeResultLose: ❌ FAILED — Roll total: {breakdown} < {damage}. Death Saves continue next turn.
CYBERPUNK.StabilizeResultNote: If new damage is taken, stabilization is lost and Death Saves restart.
CYBERPUNK.StabilizeDialogIntro: TECH + Medical Skill + 1d10 must equal or exceed {damage} total damage.
CYBERPUNK.StabilizeMedLabel: Medical Skill (Medical Tech or First Aid)
CYBERPUNK.StunSaveResultWin: ✅ SUCCESS (rolled {result} ≤ {threshold}) — {name} stays in the fight.
CYBERPUNK.StunSaveRecoveryNote: Can recover by rolling a successful Stun Save on a subsequent turn.
CYBERPUNK.SuppEvasionPromptRoll: Roll Athletics + REF + 1d10 to evade the fire zone.
CYBERPUNK.SuppEvasionPromptHint: REF {ref}, Athletics {ath} — must beat DC {dc} or take hits.
CYBERPUNK.WaitNoOneAfter: {name} is already the last active combatant this round — there is no one to wait after.
CYBERPUNK.WaitingBody: Acting after {target}. A prompt will appear when their turn ends.
CYBERPUNK.DodgeDeclareBody: All incoming melee attacks this round are at −2 to the attacker's roll. Dodge clears at the start of {name}'s next turn. (CP2020 p.102)
CYBERPUNK.ActionPenaltyClause: Penalty: {penalty} to all rolls this round.
CYBERPUNK.YourMomentBody: {name} just acted. Click ⚡ in the tracker to announce your delayed action, then fire from your character sheet.
CYBERPUNK.AcidExpiredBody: ⚗ {name} — Acid effect at {location} expired. Armor SP degradation complete.
CYBERPUNK.GasCloudPlacedBody:
Gas cloud placed on canvas (radius {radius}m). All tokens within the cloud must make Stun Saves each turn (penalty {mod}).
Cloud persists for {duration} turns, then disperses automatically. GM may reposition the template to represent wind drift.
CYBERPUNK.GasCloudTurnBody: In the gas cloud: {names}. Each must make a Stun Save{penalty}.
CYBERPUNK.StabilizedLostBody: ⚠ {name} was stabilized but has taken new damage — Death Saves are required again.
CYBERPUNK.ConcussionBody: 💥 {name} — concussion ({weapon}): {permanent} permanent HP (half of {gotThrough} after BTM); the other half is stun. Soft armor −2 SP. Stun Save required.
CYBERPUNK.LimbWoundCoreDetail: {net} net damage — severed or crushed beyond recognition (CP2020 p.103).
CYBERPUNK.MovementLockedAfterAction: Movement is locked: this character has already acted this turn (Restrict Movement to Once per Turn is on).

SETTINGS.AugmentedCombatAutomationHint: Enable automated damage application, saving throws, and area effects for the Augmented Edition combat features. Off by default.
SETTINGS.AutomationNoticeHide: Hide the Setup / What's New notice
SETTINGS.AutomationNoticeHideHint: When checked, the Cyberpunk 2020 setup & what's-new dialog stops appearing on load for the GM. Uncheck to see it again. (The notice's own 'Don't show this again' checkbox sets this too.)
SETTINGS.RestrictMovementOncePerTurn: Combat: Restrict Movement to Once per Turn
SETTINGS.RestrictMovementOncePerTurnHint: When enabled, during an active combat a combatant may reposition freely until they take a tracked action this turn (such as firing a weapon); after acting, further movement is blocked until the next round (CP2020 p.99: one move plus one action per turn). The GM can always move tokens (override). Off by default.
